---
title: "About Me"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

```{=html}
<style>
#title-block-header {
  display: none;
}

:root {
  --about-accent: #2563eb;
  --about-bg-secondary: var(--bs-tertiary-bg, #f5f5f4);
  --about-text-secondary: var(--bs-secondary-color, #57534e);
  --about-border: var(--bs-border-color, #e7e5e4);
}

.about-shell {
  max-width: 64rem;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 3rem 1.5rem 5rem;
}

.about-hero {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.about-avatar {
  width: 96px;
  height: 96px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  object-fit: cover;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.about-kicker,
.about-section-heading {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
}

.about-kicker {
  color: var(--about-accent);
  margin: 0 0 0.35rem;
}

.about-title {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 3.5vw, 3rem);
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.05;
}

.about-bio {
  max-width: 48rem;
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
  color: var(--about-text-secondary);
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.75;
}

.about-metrics {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
}

.metric-card,
.origin-card,
.journey-link-card {
  border: 1px solid var(--about-border);
  border-radius: 1.25rem;
  background: var(--about-bg-secondary);
}

.metric-card {
  padding: 1.25rem;
  text-align: center;
}

.metric-value {
  margin: 0 0 0.25rem;
  font-size: 2rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1;
}

.metric-label {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--about-text-secondary);
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  line-height: 1.4;
}

.about-section-heading {
  color: var(--about-text-secondary);
  margin: 0 0 1rem;
}

.origin-card {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
}

.origin-flag-wrap {
  width: 14rem;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.origin-flag {
  width: 100%;
  border-radius: 1rem;
  display: block;
}

.origin-title {
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.origin-copy {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--about-text-secondary);
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
}

.journey-link-card {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 1.25rem;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
}

.journey-link-title {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.journey-link-button {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 0.85rem 1.15rem;
  border-radius: 0.9rem;
  background: var(--about-accent);
  color: #fff;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.journey-link-button:hover,
.journey-link-button:focus {
  color: #fff;
  opacity: 0.92;
}

.lang-stack {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
}

.lang-bar-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: baseline;
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
}

.lang-name {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.lang-level {
  color: var(--about-text-secondary);
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  text-align: right;
}

.lang-bar-track {
  height: 0.45rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(127, 127, 127, 0.18);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.lang-bar-fill {
  width: 0;
  height: 100%;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--about-accent);
  transition: width 1s ease-out;
}

.interests-grid {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.75rem;
}

.interest-tag {
  padding: 0.55rem 1rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  border: 1px solid var(--about-border);
  color: var(--about-text-secondary);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  background: transparent;
}

@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .about-metrics {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  .journey-link-card {
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: flex-start;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .about-shell {
    padding: 2.5rem 1rem 4rem;
  }

  .about-hero,
  .origin-card {
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: flex-start;
  }

  .origin-flag-wrap {
    width: 100%;
  }

  .about-metrics {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .lang-bar-header {
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 0.15rem;
  }

  .lang-level {
    text-align: left;
  }
}
</style>

<div class="about-shell">
  <div class="about-hero">
    <img class="about-avatar" src="../files/LabPhoto.png" alt="Evanns Morales-Cuadrado in the lab">
    <div>
      <p class="about-kicker">About</p>
      <p class="about-title">The full story.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="about-bio">
    <p>
      I grew up in Puerto Rico, trained as an electrical engineer in Texas, and now spend my days at Georgia Tech working on safe autonomy for quadrotors. A lot of what matters to me sits at the intersection of rigorous control theory, hardware deployment, and community building, which is why BORI means just as much to me as the research itself.
    </p>
  </div>

  <div class="about-metrics">
    <div class="metric-card">
      <p class="metric-value">4</p>
      <p class="metric-label">Languages</p>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-card">
      <p class="metric-value">3</p>
      <p class="metric-label">Locations</p>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-card">
      <p class="metric-value">4</p>
      <p class="metric-label">Research Labs</p>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-card">
      <p class="metric-value">1</p>
      <p class="metric-label">Community Organization Founded</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <p class="about-section-heading">Where I'm From</p>
  <div class="origin-card">
    <div class="origin-flag-wrap">
      <img class="origin-flag" src="../files/about/PR_flag_island.png" alt="Puerto Rico island filled with the Puerto Rican flag">
    </div>
    <div>
      <p class="origin-title">Puerto Rico</p>
      <p class="origin-copy">
        I was born and raised on the island until I was 9. Puerto Rico shaped my values, my drive, and my sense of community. It is a big part of why I co-founded <strong>BORI (Boricuas Organized for Impact)</strong> at Georgia Tech and why staying connected to Puerto Rican culture still matters to me.
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <p class="about-section-heading">Journey</p>
  <div class="journey-link-card">
    <p class="journey-link-title">Open the interactive journey map.</p>
    <a class="journey-link-button" href="../journey/">Open Journey Map</a>
  </div>

  <p class="about-section-heading">Languages</p>
  <div class="lang-stack" id="lang-bars">
    <div class="lang-bar-container">
      <div class="lang-bar-header">
        <span class="lang-name">Spanish</span>
        <span class="lang-level">Native</span>
      </div>
      <div class="lang-bar-track">
        <div class="lang-bar-fill" data-pct="100"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="lang-bar-container">
      <div class="lang-bar-header">
        <span class="lang-name">English</span>
        <span class="lang-level">Native</span>
      </div>
      <div class="lang-bar-track">
        <div class="lang-bar-fill" data-pct="100"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="lang-bar-container">
      <div class="lang-bar-header">
        <span class="lang-name">French</span>
        <span class="lang-level">Semi-conversational</span>
      </div>
      <div class="lang-bar-track">
        <div class="lang-bar-fill" data-pct="45"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="lang-bar-container">
      <div class="lang-bar-header">
        <span class="lang-name">Portuguese</span>
        <span class="lang-level">Reads well, speech still developing</span>
      </div>
      <div class="lang-bar-track">
        <div class="lang-bar-fill" data-pct="30"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <p class="about-section-heading">Interests</p>
  <div class="interests-grid">
    <span class="interest-tag">Cooking</span>
    <span class="interest-tag">Dance</span>
    <span class="interest-tag">Reading</span>
    <span class="interest-tag">Writing</span>
    <span class="interest-tag">Community Building</span>
    <span class="interest-tag">Film</span>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  var bars = document.querySelectorAll('.lang-bar-fill');
  if (!bars.length) return;

  var observer = new IntersectionObserver(function (entries) {
    entries.forEach(function (entry) {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        entry.target.style.width = entry.target.getAttribute('data-pct') + '%';
        observer.unobserve(entry.target);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.3 });

  bars.forEach(function (bar) {
    observer.observe(bar);
  });
});
</script>
```
